hero.headline: What you've built deserves real protection.
hero.subtitle: The right coverage starts here.
hero.description: Portugal Agency was created to ensure that families and businesses in New Jersey have access to the right coverage — with clarity, care, and service in Portuguese, Spanish, and English. We connect you to the best insurers in minutes, not hours.

foundation.label: Foundation
foundation.headline: An agency built for people like you
foundation.description: Our founder built her career understanding firsthand the challenges of those growing in New Jersey. Portugal Agency exists to be the support many never had. We know what it's like to start from scratch and we want you to go far.

protection.title: Tailored protection
protection.description: Every coverage is designed for your moment — whether you're self-employed, a business owner, or head of a family.

community.title: Built for the community
community.description: We were born within the immigrant community and understand your needs like no one else.

speed.title: Fast and hassle-free
speed.description: We connect you to the best insurers in minutes, with simple and straightforward processes.

languages.title: Trilingual service
languages.description: We speak Portuguese, Spanish, and English so you feel at home.

coverages.label: Coverages
coverages.headline: The right insurance for every part of your life
coverages.description: We are an independent agency — that means we don't work for the insurers, we work for you. We compare the best plans on the market and explain each option clearly, so you can choose with confidence.

business.label: Business
business.description: No matter the size of your company, being covered isn't optional — it's what allows you to operate with peace of mind and credibility in the market.

card1.label: Employees
card1.title: Workers' comp required for employers in NJ
card1.mobile_description: Protect your team and stay compliant
card1.hover_description: Every business with employees needs workers' comp. Protect your team and keep your business compliant.

card2.label: Small business
card2.title: General liability and property protection in one package
card2.mobile_description: Complete coverage that simplifies your management
card2.hover_description: The Business Owner's Policy combines essential coverages into a single affordable plan for small businesses.

card3.label: Service providers
card3.title: Protection against errors and omissions in your work
card3.mobile_description: Defend your reputation and your growth
card3.hover_description: Professional liability protects you against allegations of negligence, errors, or failures in service delivery.

family.label: Family
family.headline: What you've built deserves to be protected
family.description: Your home, your assets, and your family's peace of mind — it all starts with the right coverage.

card1.title: Home insurance for your house
card1.description: Before choosing any coverage, you need to understand what makes sense for your reality. We schedule without rush or pressure.

card2.title: Protection against the unexpected
card2.description: Your property and everything inside it covered against damages, theft, and unforeseen events.

card3.title: Auto insurance within the law
card3.description: On the road, you need to be covered according to New Jersey requirements.

f1.title: Complete vehicle protection
f1.description: We quote from top insurers to find your best plan.

f2.title: No hassle
f2.description: You know exactly what's covered before you sign anything.

f3.title: Within the law
f3.description: Coverage that meets all New Jersey requirements for driving.

coverageCards.label: Coverage
coverageCards.headline: Insurance that protects your business
coverageCards.description: Workers' compensation, general liability and more

card1.label: Business
card1.title: Commercial solutions for real risks
card1.mobile_description: Every business faces unique challenges. We have the answers.
card1.hover_description: Tailored coverage to protect your operations, your employees, and your commercial assets.

card2.label: Business
card2.title: Coverage for employers
card2.hover_description: Mandatory workers' compensation and general liability to keep your business safe and legal.

consulting.label: Consulting
consulting.headline: Talk before you sign
consulting.description: You schedule, we talk, you understand.

card1.title: Thirty minutes for specific questions
card1.description: Direct guidance when you need quick answers.

card2.title: One hour to understand your situation
card2.description: Deep analysis of your personal, family, or business reality.

cta.headline: Ready to get started?
cta.description: Get your quote in minutes, not hours.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.headline: What our clients say
testimonials.description: Real stories from people who trusted Portugal Agency.

t1.quote: Portugal Agency helped me find the right insurance for my business in less than an hour. Exceptional service.
t1.name: Carlos Mendes

t2.quote: I finally understood my coverage. They explain everything in Portuguese, with patience and clarity.
t2.name: Ana Silva

t3.quote: I saved over $2,000 a year on my fleet insurance. I recommend them to any business owner.
t3.name: Roberto Oliveira
